record: F-01(c) pre-dispatch data-locality enumeration for exp/feedback-latent
verification_note: CURRENT-SESSION filesystem enumeration per R15 / [D-37] rule (a). Inherited claims (rho P2-P4 DVC-tracked, extracted x4 local) were RE-VERIFIED on disk this session, not trusted. Empirical ls/np.load/h5py observations lead; conclusions are downstream.
worktree_note: exp/feedback-latent is checked out at scratchpad/wt-feedback-latent (this worktree has NO nerf/ or unet-inversion/ experiment dirs). All truth cubes, raw snapshots, and src/data live at the shared main checkout /Volumes/Elements/Data/sujin/CosmoGasVision (git worktrees share one working tree location for data-heavy/DVC/untracked assets).
redshift: z=0.300 (snapdir_012); box=60000 kpc/h (60 Mpc/h), h-param confirmed in HDF5 header

P1.note: Real-space overdensity rho/<rho>. Produced by d75 CIC path (scripts/d75_corrected_metric_rescore.py). NOT DVC-tracked (nerf artifact); lives only on this disk.

rho_overdensity.summary: ALL 4 rho cubes EXIST at 192^3 and load cleanly. dvc status could not be run cleanly repo-wide because an unrelated corrupt AppleDouble file (stage2/._g2_pred_test_p1_..._.npy.dvc, non-utf8 name) aborts dvc's .dvc scan; the P2-P4 .dvc files themselves are valid and their .npy targets are present+readable. Recommend deleting ._*.dvc litter before next dvc op.

T_temperature.source_field: PartType0/InternalEnergy (+ ElectronAbundance for mean molecular weight mu); T = (gamma-1)*mu*m_p/k_B * u

P1.note: This is ONLY the line-of-sight (z) component, mass-weighted CIC (momz/mass). Not the full 3-vector v_pec. Under a vlos_gate discharge bound to this exact md5.

v_pec_peculiar_velocity.source_field: PartType0/Velocities (3-vector; a^0.5 GADGET convention as handled in d75)
v_pec_peculiar_velocity.blocker_and_precedent: load_3d_field(field='vlos') raises NotImplementedError, BUT scripts/d75_corrected_metric_rescore.py already produced the z-component via mass-weighted momentum CIC (momz192/mass192) reusing _cic_deposit_inplace. That is a WORKING, in-tree recipe for velocity that needs no SPH kernel. Generalizing to x/y/z x 4 variants is a parameter/loop change on a proven path, not new physics.

per_variant.snapdir_012: 16x snap_012.{0..15}.hdf5 + 2 checksum txt (18 files) per variant

raw_data_locality.raw_tarballs: ALSO present (RAW-TARBALL-PRESENT) alongside extracted: SherwoodIGM_gal/planck1_60_768*_z0.300.tar.gz (~27-29 GB each). Redundant with extracted/; can be pruned if disk pressure.
raw_data_locality.redshift_coverage: ONLY z=0.300 (snapdir_012) is extracted. No other redshift local. Matches the F-01 requirement (z=0.3).

loader_lineage_assessment.rho_path: SherwoodIGMGalLoader.load_3d_field(field='rho') -> mass-weighted CIC via _cic_deposit_inplace (chunked, [D-50]-gated). Fully working; produced the rho cubes at n_grid up to 768, pooled/point-sampled to 192.
loader_lineage_assessment.T_xHI_vlos_path: STUBBED: src/data/igm_gal_loader.py:177-182 raises NotImplementedError. Docstring claims SPH-kernel weighting vs Density+SmoothingLength is required for intensive quantities.
loader_lineage_assessment.does_rho_CIC_generalize: NOT as a bare parameter change to load_3d_field (the field='T'/'xHI'/'vlos' branch is an explicit NotImplementedError). HOWEVER the underlying kernel generalizes cheaply: intensive fields = mass-weighted CIC = deposit sum(m_i * q_i) and sum(m_i) in two CIC passes, then divide. _cic_deposit_inplace already accepts arbitrary per-particle weights, and d75 already used exactly this for velocity (momz/mass). So the CIC machinery IS sufficient for a first-order mass-weighted deposit; full SPH-kernel (Density/SmoothingLength) weighting is an OPTIONAL accuracy upgrade, a methodology decision for the track, not a hard prerequisite.
loader_lineage_assessment.sightline_note: The 1D SherwoodLoader (los2048_*.dat) DOES carry per-bin density/h1_frac/temp/v_pec, but along sightlines only (num_los x nbins), not as a 3D field. Not a substitute for 192^3 cubes; useful only as an RMS cross-check (d75 used the los-file v_pec RMS as an S4 gate on the deposited velocity).

effort_per_missing_cube.v_pec_full_vector_P1_P4: LOW-MEDIUM. Proven momentum-CIC recipe exists in d75; extend to 3 components x 4 variants. ~1 script.
effort_per_missing_cube.T_P1_P4: MEDIUM. Mass-weighted CIC of InternalEnergy + mu from ElectronAbundance; positivity trivially holds. New branch in load_3d_field or standalone producer.
effort_per_missing_cube.xHI_P1_P4: MEDIUM. Mass-weighted CIC of NeutralHydrogenAbundance; must clamp/validate to [0,1] (mass-weighting keeps it in-range if done correctly).
effort_per_missing_cube.shared: All three can co-deposit in a SINGLE streaming pass over each variant's 16 HDF5 files (read Coordinates+Masses+Velocities+InternalEnergy+ElectronAbundance+NeutralHydrogenAbundance once, scatter into 1 mass grid + N weighted grids). This amortizes the dominant cost = ~40 GB/variant HDF5 I/O. Rough wall: order tens of min to ~1-2 hr per variant dominated by I/O at n_grid=192.
effort_per_missing_cube.biggest_effort_item: ONE new mass-weighted-intensive-CIC producer script (replacing the load_3d_field NotImplementedError stub for T/xHI/vlos) plus a validation contract (T>0, 0<=xHI<=1, finite v_pec) and a physics cross-check gate (deposited RMS vs los-file v_pec RMS, like d75 S4). Not blocked by data — raw is fully local. Blocked only by absent code + a methodology call on CIC-mass-weight vs full SPH-kernel.

bottom_line.EXIST: rho/<rho> 192^3 for ALL 4 variants (P1 nerf/d75, P2-P4 unet stage1 DVC-tracked, all readable). Plus a P1 vlos_z (LOS-component-only) velocity cube.
bottom_line.MISSING_but_PRODUCIBLE: T, xHI, and full-vector v_pec for all 4 variants. Raw snapshots fully extracted+local at z=0.3; all needed PartType0 fields present; proven CIC kernel in-tree.
bottom_line.BLOCKED: None hard-blocked. Soft block = load_3d_field NotImplementedError stub for T/xHI/vlos and a pending methodology decision (mass-weighted CIC vs SPH-kernel deposition).
bottom_line.single_biggest_effort_item: Write one mass-weighted intensive-quantity 3D deposition producer (T, xHI, v_pec) with per-field validation + RMS cross-check gate; run once per variant over the 40 GB HDF5 sets (I/O-dominated, single-pass co-deposit).
